entries.description: Started Session 1 via `python -m ai_router.start_session --session-set-dir docs/session-sets/024-remove-provider-queues-and-heartbeats-views --engine claude-code --provider anthropic --model claude-opus-4-7 --effort medium` per the state-first protocol Set 022 shipped. State file flipped currentSession null -> 1, status not-started -> in-progress, lifecycleState null -> work_in_progress; work_started event appended to session-events.jsonl.

Deleted five TypeScript source files that the spec listed as removed in their entirety: src/providers/ProviderQueuesProvider.ts (481 LOC), src/providers/ProviderHeartbeatsProvider.ts (437 LOC), src/commands/queueActions.ts (210 LOC), src/test/suite/providerQueues.test.ts (240 LOC), src/test/suite/providerHeartbeats.test.ts (274 LOC).

Edited tools/dabbler-ai-orchestration/package.json: removed two `views` entries (dabblerProviderQueues, dabblerProviderHeartbeats); five `commands` entries (dabblerProviderQueues.refresh / .openPayload / .markFailed / .forceReclaim, dabblerProviderHeartbeats.refresh); four `menus` entries (two `view/title` + two `view/item/context`); six `configuration.properties` under dabblerProviderQueues.* and dabblerProviderHeartbeats.*; and the 'Falls back to dabblerProviderQueues.pythonPath if unset' clause from dabblerSessionSets.pythonPath's markdownDescription.

Edited tools/dabbler-ai-orchestration/src/extension.ts: removed three imports (ProviderQueuesProvider, ProviderHeartbeatsProvider + HEARTBEAT_FOOTER, registerQueueActionCommands); the entire Provider Queues view registration block (registerTreeDataProvider, refresh command, setInterval auto-refresh, onDidChangeConfiguration listener, registerQueueActionCommands call); and the entire Provider Heartbeats view registration block (createTreeView with HEARTBEAT_FOOTER description, refresh command, setInterval auto-refresh, onDidChangeConfiguration listener). Net: ~105 lines removed.

Edited tools/dabbler-ai-orchestration/src/commands/installAiRouterCommands.ts: simplified resolvePythonPath()'s fallback chain from `dabblerSessionSets.pythonPath -> dabblerProviderQueues.pythonPath -> 'python'` to `dabblerSessionSets.pythonPath -> 'python'`, removing the middle reference to a setting that no longer exists in the schema. Comment block trimmed to match the simpler two-tier chain.

Deleted tools/dabbler-ai-orchestration/src/utils/pythonRunner.ts (93 LOC). Confirmed via Grep that the file's only callers in src/ were the deleted providers and queueActions.ts; with those gone, runPythonModule and resolvePythonPath have no remaining users in source. Also trimmed a stale JSDoc reference to `runPythonModule` in src/utils/aiRouterInstall.ts (was 'mirroring the pattern in runPythonModule so the UI...' -> 'so the UI...'). This is beyond the spec's explicit deletion list but matches the spec's intent ('Keep generic helpers used by other commands' — no remaining commands use it) and the operator's standing preference against leaving dead code.

Edited tools/dabbler-ai-orchestration/src/test/suite/installAiRouter.test.ts: removed the import block for ProviderQueuesProvider/ProviderHeartbeatsProvider (including buildTreeItem and parseFetchResult re-exports), and truncated the file at line 1025 to drop the five provider-related suites that occupied lines 1027-1307 (parseFetchResult, failure-invalidates-cache, tree-item-rendering for each provider). 35 install-only suites remain.

Bumped extension version 0.13.13 -> 0.13.14 in package.json (one place), package-lock.json (two places: top-level and root package node), CHANGELOG.md (new ## [0.13.14] -- 2026-05-15 section with Removed + Migration subsections documenting every operator-visible impact), and CLAUDE.md (Current line).

Ran `npm run compile` (esbuild bundle for dist/) and `npx tsc --outDir out` (typecheck + emit). Both passed exit 0 with no warnings. Cleaned out/ and rebuilt to confirm no stale artifacts. Also ran the modified installAiRouter.test.ts file in isolation via `npx mocha --ui tdd --require ts-node/register src/test/suite/installAiRouter.test.ts`: 35/35 tests pass (down from 49; the 14 removed were the five provider suites). Full Electron-host `npm test` could not launch Code.exe in this environment due to a pre-existing CLI-flag incompatibility (same limitation Set 023 Session 4 hit).

Cross-provider verification via ai_router.query(model='gpt-5-4', task_type='session-verification'). Prompt included six targeted questions (stranded imports, package.json consistency, resolvePythonPath simplification, pythonPath description consistency, CHANGELOG fidelity, overall verdict) plus the full unified diff (102,925 chars). Verdict: SAFE TO SHIP, no blockers across all six questions. Two non-blocking refinements: (1) lock-in test for resolvePythonPath — DEFERRED (requires vscode-host runtime, expands scope beyond deletion-only Set 024); (2) CHANGELOG migration sentence — APPLIED in-session (Migration subsection added under [0.13.14]). Cost: $0.1394 (26,696 input tokens, 4,847 output tokens). Raw verifier output preserved at session-reviews/session-001/verify-result.json + session-001-review.md.
